23ec72e2-7dce-4dbd-a5c2-24eeea88bea5.label: text_chunk
23ec72e2-7dce-4dbd-a5c2-24eeea88bea5.text:
Annex III – Non Disclosure Agreement

This agreement is made between PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP, a limited liability partnership incorporated in England (number OC303525) whose registered office is at 1 Embankment Place, London WC2N 6RH ("PwC"); and whose registered office is at (“you”).

Background

In connection with our discussions relating to ‘[Insert project name]’ (the “purpose”) certain confidential information may be disclosed between us.

73fb92cd-03c3-4118-9ced-f8bdbe49f555.label: text_chunk
73fb92cd-03c3-4118-9ced-f8bdbe49f555.text:
1 Definitions

In this agreement the following words have the meanings given to them below:
“confidential information” means any information disclosed by one party to the other party in connection with the purpose, which is of a confidential nature irrespective of whether it is marked as such.“disclosing party” means the party to this agreement disclosing the confidential information.“PwC firm” means any entity or partnership within the worldwide network of PricewaterhouseCoopers firms and entities.

fd8725b3-522a-4afe-91e7-25fbebfb4532.label: text_chunk
fd8725b3-522a-4afe-91e7-25fbebfb4532.text:
“receiving party” means the party to this agreement to whom the confidential information is disclosed.

2 Confidentiality

2.1 The receiving party agrees:

(a) to keep the disclosing party’s confidential information, confidential;

(b) not to use the disclosing party’s confidential information except in connection with the purpose; and

(c) not to disclose the disclosing party’s confidential information to  anyone else.

2.

2 Each party agrees that it will keep the purpose and the existence of this agreement confidential.

8c1d7245-0fe4-4176-a928-fbc94bf58fd2.label: text_chunk
8c1d7245-0fe4-4176-a928-fbc94bf58fd2.text:
2.3 This agreement will not apply to information which:

(a) is publicly available; or

(b) has been received from  someone else who owes no duty of confidence in relation to it;

 or

(c) was already known by the receiving party.

17330f39-f0fa-4eb7-ba8e-85a5980225e9.label: text_chunk
17330f39-f0fa-4eb7-ba8e-85a5980225e9.text:
2.4 Nothing in this agreement will prevent the receiving party from disclosing confidential information:

(a) if the disclosing party has given its prior written consent; or

(b) to its lawyers; or

(c) if the disclosure is required by law, regulation or professional requirements; or (d) in the case of PwC, to other PwC firms or relevant subcontractors.

2.5 The receiving party will ensure that anyone who receives confidential information under clause 2.

a816971e-9ae0-4f08-b384-e2bd3bc9d322.label: text_chunk
a816971e-9ae0-4f08-b384-e2bd3bc9d322.text:
4 (b) is bound by confidentiality obligations before the confidential information is disclosed.

2.

6 Nothing in this agreement will restrict your ability to disclose PwC’s advice concerning the tax (including social security) treatment or tax structure of any transaction regardless of any confidentiality markings on any communications.

3 Term

3.

73b9066a-9936-4287-bcd9-33dc661b28e4.label: text_chunk
73b9066a-9936-4287-bcd9-33dc661b28e4.text: 1 This agreement will come into effect on the date of signature by both parties and will continue indefinitely, subject to any subsequent agreement entered into between the parties in relation to the purpose which includes obligations relating to the protection of confidential information. The subsequent agreement will then replace this agreement with effect from the commencement of our services.

e61ff07e-e0e5-4d74-b240-9a21193a5dac.label: text_chunk
e61ff07e-e0e5-4d74-b240-9a21193a5dac.text:
3.2 Following a written request from the disclosing party, the receiving party will,

 as soon as practicable, either destroy or return all confidential information to the disclosing party or, in the case of electronic copies of confidential information, delete them or make them reasonably inaccessible. However, PwC may retain a copy of the confidential information for our internal purposes.

4 General

This agreement forms the entire agreement between the parties relating to confidential information disclosed in connection with the purpose.

1537fd74-19bd-4bf0-b80e-2952e6e6bc7e.label: text_chunk
1537fd74-19bd-4bf0-b80e-2952e6e6bc7e.text:
It replaces any earlier agreements, representations or discussions.  Neither party excludes liability for any fraud.

5 Governing law and jurisdiction

This agreement and any dispute arising from it, whether contractual or non- contractual, will be governed by English law and be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the English courts.SIGNED for and on behalf of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP By ……………………………………………………….

community_summary.0:
The relationships summarized involve PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP and an individual or entity referred to as 'you'. 

1. **Parties to Agreement**: PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP and 'you' are both parties to a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA), indicating a mutual commitment to confidentiality.

2. **Governing Law**: The NDA is governed by English law, establishing the legal framework that will guide the interpretation and enforcement of the agreement.

3. **Jurisdiction**: Any disputes arising from the NDA will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the English courts, which means that legal proceedings must be conducted within this jurisdiction.

Overall, these relationships highlight the legal obligations and frameworks that bind PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP and 'you' under the terms of the Non-Disclosure Agreement, emphasizing the importance of confidentiality, legal governance, and dispute resolution.
community_summary.1: The relationship between PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP and the Non Disclosure Agreement (NDA) is defined by the NDA serving as the governing document that outlines the terms for the disclosure of confidential information. This agreement establishes the framework for how confidential information can be shared between PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP and the other party, referred to as 'you'. The NDA is crucial in ensuring that sensitive information is protected and that both parties understand their obligations regarding confidentiality.
community_summary.2:
The relationships primarily involve two entities: the Disclosing Party and the Receiving Party. 

1. **Disclosing Party**: This entity is responsible for disclosing or providing Confidential Information to the Receiving Party. The role of the Disclosing Party is crucial as it initiates the transfer of sensitive information under the terms of an agreement.

2. **Receiving Party**: This entity receives the Confidential Information from the Disclosing Party. The relationship emphasizes the trust placed in the Receiving Party to handle the disclosed information appropriately.

In summary, the Disclosing Party is the entity that shares confidential information with the Receiving Party, highlighting the importance of confidentiality and trust in their agreement.
community_summary.3: The PwC Firm is involved in the management and handling of Confidential Information as part of its operations within the network of PricewaterhouseCoopers firms. This relationship underscores the firm's responsibility and role in safeguarding sensitive data in its professional activities.
community_summary.4:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Receiving Party and Information**: The Receiving Party is defined as the entity that obtains information, which is governed by confidentiality terms outlined in an agreement.

2. **Receiving Party and Disclosing Party**: The Receiving Party is permitted to disclose confidential information only with prior written consent from the Disclosing Party, emphasizing the importance of consent in the handling of sensitive information.

3. **Receiving Party and PwC**: The Receiving Party has the ability to disclose confidential information to other PwC firms or relevant subcontractors, indicating a structured internal relationship within the PwC organization. Additionally, PwC retains copies of confidential information for its internal purposes, highlighting its role in managing and safeguarding such information.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the Receiving Party's responsibilities and limitations regarding the handling of confidential information, the necessity of consent from the Disclosing Party, and the internal dynamics involving PwC in the management of this information.

2. **Agreement and Parties**: The agreement involves multiple parties who are legally bound by its terms and conditions, establishing a formal relationship between them.

3. **Agreement and Confidential Information**: The agreement protects confidential information by imposing obligations on the parties to ensure that such sensitive data is adequately safeguarded.

In summary, the agreement serves as a foundational document that outlines the treatment of information, binds the involved parties to its terms, and ensures the protection of confidential information.

community_summary.15: The Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) involves a Partner, who is identified as the other party in the agreement. This relationship emphasizes the collaborative nature of the NDA, highlighting the importance of confidentiality between the involved entities.
community_summary.16:
The relationships summarized below highlight the key aspects of an agreement and its implications for the parties involved:

1. **Agreement and Information Sharing**: The agreement governs the conditions under which information can be shared, emphasizing confidentiality obligations that must be adhered to by the parties.

2. **Framework for Business Relationship**: The agreement establishes a framework for the business relationship, detailing the management of confidential information between the involved parties.

3. **Obligations Regarding Confidential Information**: It outlines specific obligations concerning the handling of confidential information, which the parties are required to follow until the agreement is terminated.

4. **Entitlement to Attorneys' Fees**: The agreement entitles the prevailing party in any dispute to recover reasonable attorneys' fees and costs, providing a financial incentive for compliance and resolution.

5. **Enforcement by Court**: The agreement may be enforced or revised by a court if any of its provisions are deemed unenforceable, ensuring legal backing for the terms outlined.

Overall, the agreement serves as a critical document that not only governs the sharing of information and establishes business relationships but also sets forth obligations, entitlements, and mechanisms for enforcement.
community_summary.17: The relationship between "Protects" and "Non-Disclosure Agreement" emphasizes that a non-disclosure agreement (NDA) is designed to safeguard confidential information. This legal contract binds the involved parties to maintain the secrecy of sensitive data shared between them. The NDA plays a crucial role in ensuring that confidential information remains protected from unauthorized disclosure.
community_summary.18:
The relationships summarized involve clients and a non-solicitation agreement, as well as the partnership between BCG and another partner. 

1. **Clients and Non-solicitation Agreement**: Clients have entered into a mutual non-solicitation agreement, which prohibits them from soliciting each other's existing customers for business services. This indicates a collaborative effort to protect each other's client bases.

2. **BCG and Partner**: BCG and its partner have established a mutual non-solicitation agreement that prevents either party from soliciting or recruiting the other's employees, contractors, or affiliated resources. This agreement is effective during the term of their partnership and extends for twelve months after its conclusion, highlighting the importance of maintaining workforce integrity and stability.

Overall, these relationships emphasize the significance of mutual agreements in protecting business interests and resources among clients and partners.
community_summary.19: The relationship between Partner and BCG is characterized by a collaborative engagement, as both entities have entered into agreements to work together on joint customer business initiatives. This partnership signifies a commitment to collaboration and shared objectives in their business endeavors.
